  1. de.fhdwhannover.integrea.io.input.dataReader

    1. importData(String)

Schnittstelle DataReader<T>

Typparameter:
T - the type of data elements returned after import
public interface DataReader<T>
Generic interface for importing external data into the system.

Implementations of this interface define how data of a specific type T is read from a given file path and transformed into a list of usable objects. This abstraction allows different data formats (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) to be integrated seamlessly into the application, especially for components that require flexible input sources such as evolutionary algorithms or configuration loaders.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    List<T>
    importData(String enteredFilepath)
    Imports data from the file located at the specified path.

  • Methodendetails

    • importData

      List<T> importData(String enteredFilepath)
      Imports data from the file located at the specified path.

      The method reads the file content, converts it into objects of type T, and returns them as a list. Implementations may handle exceptions internally or propagate them, depending on the intended behavior.

      Parameter:
      enteredFilepath - the path to the file that should be imported
      Gibt zurück:
      a list of imported data elements; may be empty if the file contains no data or an error occurs
